spans.content: This form is approved by the Illinois Supreme Court and is required to be accepted in all Illinois Circuit Courts.

STATE OF ILLINOIS,CIRCUIT COURTCOUNTYSMALL CLAIMS COMPLAINTFor Court Use Only
Instructions<Zirui Ye
Directly above,enterthe name of thecounty where you arefiling the case.
Plaintiff (First, middle, last name)V.Defendants (First, middle, last name or business name):Central East Asian Cuisine
Enter your name asPlaintiff.
Case Number
Enter the names of all people or businessesyou are suing asDefendants.
The Circuit Clerk wiladd a Case Number.

spans.content: Jury Trial Request by Filing Separate Form. If you want your case decided by a jury instead of a judge, you have to file a Jury Request form.
Jury trials can sometimes be more complicated and an additional fee may be required.

a. I have no written agreement with Defendants.
I have a written agreement with Defendants and it is attached.
I have a written agreement with Defendants but I have not attached it because:

spans.html:
In 1, enter your name. In 2,enter the name and addressof each
If you are suing more than 2 Defendants, use the Additional Defendants (Small Claims Complaint) form and attach it. In 3,enter the amount of money
that is owed to you. It must be $10,000 or less.Do not include court costs.Check 3a, 3b,or 3c.If you have a written agreement,attach that contract or other document as proof of your agreement to thisSmall Claims Complaint, or explain why you
cannot. In 4,check the box if it applies.

spans.html:
In 5,enter the reasons why Defendant owes this money to you.
If you need more space,complete the Additional Reasons (Small Claims Complaint) form and

Defendants owe me this amount of money because:On May 30th,2024,I dined inat this restaurant.Two friends were with me.We ordered Big Plate Whole Chicken. There
was small bones in this cuisine l cracked one of my teeth immediately.I notified the staff and
they apologized.I thought it was fine but then the pain increased so much more later that
day and the second day. I then had to visit my dentist to extract the tooth because the
dentist did an X-ray showing that the tooth was basically broken.
July this year l did my dental implant for this missing tooth and it cost around $4500.Iwant
to sue this restaurant to get compensated for the total cost of my dental treatment as well
as emotional stress. Thus, I demand a total amount of $5500.

Under Illinois Supreme Court Rule 137, your signature means that you have read the document, that to the best of your belief, it is true and correct and that you are not filing it for an improper purpose, such as to
cause delay. If you are completing this form on a computer, sign your name by typing it. If you are completing it by hand, sign and print your name.
Enter your complete address,telephone number and email address,if youhave
one. GETTINGCOURTD

spans.content: GETTING COURT DOCUMENTS BY EMAIL: You should use an email account that you do not share with anyone else and that you check
every day. If you do not check your email every day, you may miss important information, notice of court dates, or documents from other parties.
Enter the Case Number given by the Circuit Clerk:
